results.title: A Monthly Weight Loss Shot? Why Pfizer Could Topple Lilly's and Novo's GLP-1 Duopoly | Motley Fool
Pharma 50 2026: Lilly is betting on staying at the top
Pfizer Reaches Three Settlement Agreements for VYNDAMAX

summary: Eli Lilly reported Q1 2026 blowout on April 30 (EPS/revenue beat, raised FY guidance to $82-85B, stock +7%). Lilly's GLP-1 dominance (Mounjaro/Zepbound ~$36.5B in FY2025) is the primary competitive threat to Pfizer's obesity pipeline. Novo Nordisk also dominant in GLP-1. Pfizer has 20+ obesity trials including potential monthly PF-3944 shot. Merck's Keytruda competes with Pfizer's oncology. AstraZeneca/Daiichi Sankyo pressure ADC portfolio.
